title: A Flower And Resin Pendent Workshop
description: Create your own botanical jewellery in this relaxed, hands-on workshop. Using real pressed flowers and UV resin, you’ll design and make a unique pendant necklace to take home. You’ll be guided step-by-step through arranging delicate florals, working with resin, and finishing your piece to a high standard. With a curated selection of flowers, foliage, and subtle gold accents to choose from, you can create something that reflects your own style, whether minimal, colourful, or romantic. No experience is needed, making this workshop perfect for beginners or anyone looking to try something new in a calm, creative setting. All materials are provided, including your pendant and chain, and you’ll leave with a finished piece of jewellery to keep or gift. More spaces and offers avalibe on silverandsage.co.uk Duration is approximately 1.5–2 hours.
content_warnings: The workshop is help in the Function room of The Round Georges Pub and it is down a flight of stairs
